get.description: Retrieves former/graduating students who still have unreturned books, optionally including loan details.

parameters.description: True to include loan detail structures
parameters.name: details

get.description: Generates a printable PDF for former/graduating students with their unreturned books.
Retrieves current allowed/denied flags for permissions across all system roles.

put.description: Enables or disables a specific permission for a user role.

get.description: Retrieves all immutable records in the system's audit trail, including deletions and cancellations.
Retrieves all administrative and staff users registered in the system.

post.description: Registers a new system user (admin, teacher, staff) with hashed password and role assignments.

put.description: Modifies an existing user's properties, role, active status, or password.

delete.description: Deletes a system user by their ID and registers the deletion in the audit log.
Deletes a specific physical book copy by its ID from the library catalog and registers the deletion in the audit trail.

post.description: Marks a physical copy as decommissioned: sets ist_ausgesondert=true and ist_ausleihbar=false.

put.description: Updates the barcode of a physical book copy, replacing placeholders like AUTO-.

post.description: Updates the custom damage or condition note text of a physical book copy.

put.description: Updates the status (ist_ausleihbar, ist_ausgesondert) and the condition note of a physical book copy.

delete.description: Deletes a specific book title and all associated physical copies, registering the deletion in the audit trail.

get.description: Retrieves all physical book copies associated with a given title ID, including availability status.

post.description: Marks all 'ausstehend' books as 'verloren' and resets inventory states.
Records that a physical copy was physically present during a stock-take.
Resets old inventory states and sets 'ausstehend' for the chosen scope.

get.description: Retrieves all unique school class names currently assigned to students.
Retrieves students, optionally filtered by a specific school class, along with loan counts.

post.description: Creates a new student profile in the library database.

get.description: Retrieves the complete profile for a student by their ID, including active loans and avatar photo URL if present.

delete.description: Transactionally deletes a student from the system, checks for active loans or unpaid damage fees, anonymizes historical loans, and writes to audit_log.

post.description: Erhöht die Klassenstufe aller aktiven Schüler um 1. Markiert Abschlussklassen (9H, 10R, 13) automatisch als Abgänger.
